AdminHostInfo.title: Show additional information in the menu bar
AdminHostInfo.description: If present, displays additional computer information in the Login Window. Clicking the time area of the menu bar toggles through computer information values.

LoginwindowText.title: Banner
LoginwindowText.description: The text to display in the Login Window.

SHOWFULLNAME.title: Display login window as
SHOWFULLNAME.description: If true, shows the name and password dialog. If false, displays a list of users.

HideLocalUsers.title: Hide local users
HideLocalUsers.description: If true, shows only network and system users in the user list.

HideMobileAccounts.title: Hide mobile accounts
HideMobileAccounts.description: If true, hides mobile account users in a user list. In some cases, mobile users show up as network users.

IncludeNetworkUser.title: Show network users
IncludeNetworkUser.description: If true, shows network users in the user list.

HideAdminUsers.title: Hide Mac computer's administrator accounts
HideAdminUsers.description: If true, hides administrator users when showing a user list.

SHOWOTHERUSERS_MANAGED.title: Show "Other"
SHOWOTHERUSERS_MANAGED.description: If true, displays an "Other..." option when showing the user list.

SleepDisabled.title: Hide the Sleep button
SleepDisabled.description: If true, disables the Sleep button.

RestartDisabled.title: Hide the Restart button
RestartDisabled.description: If true, disables the Restart item.

ShutDownDisabled.title: Hide the Shut Down button
ShutDownDisabled.description: If true, disables the Shut Down button.

PowerOffDisabled.title: Hide the Power Off button
PowerOffDisabled.description: If true, disables the Power Off button.

RestartDisabledWhileLoggedIn.title: Disable the Restart menu item while logged in
RestartDisabledWhileLoggedIn.description: If true, disables the Restart menu item when a user is logged in.

ShutDownDisabledWhileLoggedIn.title: Disable the Shut Down menu item while logged in
ShutDownDisabledWhileLoggedIn.description: If true, disables the Shut Down menu item when a user is logged in.

PowerOffDisabledWhileLoggedIn.title: Disable the Power Off menu item while logged in
PowerOffDisabledWhileLoggedIn.description: If true, disables the Power Off menu item when a user is logged in.

LogOutDisabledWhileLoggedIn.title: Disable the Log Out menu item while logged in
LogOutDisabledWhileLoggedIn.description: If true, disables the Log Out menu item when a user is logged in. Requires macOS 10.13 or later.

DisableScreenLockImmediate.title: Disable the immediate Screen Lock function
DisableScreenLockImmediate.description: If true, disables the immediate Screen Lock functions. Requires macOS 10.13 or later.

showInputMenu.title: Show input menu in login window
showInputMenu.description: If true, shows the Input Menu in the Login Window. Requires macOS 10.8 or later.

HiddenUsersList.title: Hidden Users List
HiddenUsersList.description: Usernames to hide from the login window user list.

com.apple.login.mcx.DisableAutoLoginClie.title: Disable automatic login if FileVault is disabled
com.apple.login.mcx.DisableAutoLoginClie.description: If true, requires a password to log in when FileVault is disabled.

AutologinUsername.title: Auto Login Username
AutologinUsername.description: The user short name for an existing user to set up auto login. Requires macOS 14.0 or later.

AutologinPassword.title: Auto Login Password
AutologinPassword.description: The password for the AutologinUsername user. Must match the user's current password. Requires macOS 14.0 or later.

DisableFDEAutoLogin.title: Disable automatic login if FileVault is enabled
DisableFDEAutoLogin.description: If true, disables the automatic login option when FileVault is active. Requires macOS 10.9 or later.

DisableConsoleAccess.title: Disable >console login
DisableConsoleAccess.description: If true, disregards the >console special user name that provides a command line UI.

EnableExternalAccounts.title: Enable external accounts
EnableExternalAccounts.description: If true, allows external accounts to log in.

AdminMayDisableMCX.title: Mac computer administrators may refresh content or disable management
AdminMayDisableMCX.description: If true, allows Mac administrators to refresh or disable management features.

TALLogoutSavesState.title: Reopen windows when logging back in
TALLogoutSavesState.description: If true, reopens windows that were open at the time of logout.

UseComputerNameForComputerRecordName.title: Set Mac computer name to computer record name
UseComputerNameForComputerRecordName.description: If true, forces the Mac name to be set as the computer record name.

AllowList.title: Allowed Users or Groups
AllowList.description: List of user or group GUIDs allowed to log in. Applies to network and mobile accounts only. An asterisk (*) specifies all users or groups.

DenyList.title: Denied Users or Groups
DenyList.description: List of user or group GUIDs denied from logging in. Takes priority over AllowList. Applies to network and mobile accounts only.

LocalUserLoginEnabled.title: Local-only users may log in
LocalUserLoginEnabled.description: If true, permits only local users to log in. Network users will not be allowed.

LocalUsersHaveWorkgroups.title: Local-only users use available workgroup settings
LocalUsersHaveWorkgroups.description: If true, local users are forced to use any available workgroup settings.

FlattenUserWorkgroups.title: Ignore workgroup nesting
FlattenUserWorkgroups.description: If true and users are part of a nested workgroup, only the settings of the user's direct workgroup are enforced.

CombineUserWorkgroups.title: Combine available workgroup settings
CombineUserWorkgroups.description: If true and users are part of a nested workgroup, all nested workgroup settings are enforced.

AlwaysShowWorkgroupDialog.title: Always show workgroup dialog during log in
AlwaysShowWorkgroupDialog.description: If true and the workgroup has a specific dialog, that dialog is shown at login.

ChangePasswordDisabled.title: Disallow user to change password
ChangePasswordDisabled.description: If true, disables the Change Password button in Users & Groups.

RetriesUntilHint.title: Show password hints after failed attempts
RetriesUntilHint.description: Number of failed attempts before showing a password hint. Set to 0 to disable password hints.
